label: Beginner
description: You can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases. You can introduce yourself and others and can ask and answer questions about personal details.

label: Elementary
description: You can understand sentences and frequently used expressions related to areas of immediate relevance. You can communicate in simple and routine tasks.

label: Intermediate
description: You can understand the main points of clear standard input on familiar matters. You can deal with most situations likely to arise while travelling in an English-speaking area.

label: Upper-Intermediate
description: You can understand the main ideas of complex text on both concrete and abstract topics. You can interact with a degree of fluency and spontaneity that makes regular interaction with native speakers quite possible.
